name: Aditi Sharma
text: The Spiti Valley trip with Mystical Expedition was beyond anything I expected. Chandratal Lake at sunrise, the ancient murals of Tabo Monastery, the raw beauty of Dhankar — every single day felt like a different planet. The team handled every detail at high altitude flawlessly. I will be back for the Kinnaur circuit!

name: Rohit Kumar
text: Crossing the Kunzum Pass and camping at Chandratal was the highlight of my life. Mystical Expedition's 10-day Spiti circuit was perfectly paced — enough time at each stop, no rushing, great homestays. The driver knew every road and shortcut in the valley. Absolutely trustworthy team for high-altitude travel.

name: Neha Kapoor
text: From Chitkul — the last village of India — to the monasteries of Kaza, this trip was surreal. Our guide explained the history of every monastery and village. Accommodation was cosy despite being at 4,000m+. Mystical Expedition made the remote Spiti Valley feel welcoming and safe. A truly life-changing journey.

name: Arjun Mehta
text: I did the Manali–Spiti–Kinnaur circuit in 10 days and every day was better than the last. Key Monastery perched on the cliff, the Kibber village, the Chicham suspension bridge — all spectacular. Mystical Expedition's planning was impeccable. Communication was prompt and the itinerary had the perfect balance of driving and exploring.

name: Priya Nair
text: Spiti Valley is not for the faint-hearted, but Mystical Expedition made it accessible even for first-timers like me. The acclimatisation stops were planned thoughtfully. Langza village with the giant Buddha statue at sunset was breathtaking. The Gue Mummy monastery stop was eerie and fascinating. 10/10 experience.

name: Vikram Singh
text: Travelled with my family on the 7-day Spiti circuit from Chandigarh. The team at Mystical Expedition was incredibly careful about altitude sickness precautions for the kids. Nako Lake, Tabo Monastery, the Dhankar fortress — every stop was unforgettable. Safe, well-organised, and genuinely passionate about Spiti. Highly recommended!
